title: Totò e Peppino divisi a Berlino
writer: Agenore Incrocci, Furio Scarpelli, Sandro Continenza
actors: Totò, Peppino De Filippo, Nadia Sanders
plot: Antonio goes to West Berlin and meets Giuseppe. But Antonio looks like Canarinis, a wanted war criminal, So the daughter of the criminal pays Antonio to impersonate him.
